mapper.select: SELECT H.HOSPITAL_ID, H.BIZ_NO, H.NAME, H.PHONE, H.ADDR, H.ADDR_DETAIL, H.DESCRIPTION, H.HOURS_JSON, H.TAG_LIST, H.LAT, H.LNG FROM TB_HOSPITAL H JOIN TB_BUSINESS B ON H.BIZ_NO = B.BIZ_NO WHERE B.BIZ_ID = #{bizId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_HOSPITAL ( HOSPITAL_ID, BIZ_NO, MEMBER_NO, NAME, PHONE, ADDR, ADDR_DETAIL, APPROVE_DATE, STATUS_CD ) SELECT (SELECT NVL(MAX(HOSPITAL_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_HOSPITAL), B.BIZ_NO, (SELECT MEMBER_NO FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = B.BIZ_ID OR EMAIL = B.BIZ_ID FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), B.BIZ_NAME, B.PHONE, B.ADDR, B.ADDR_DETAIL, SYSDATE, 'ACTIVE' FROM TB_BUSINESS B WHERE B.BIZ_ID = #{bizId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_HOSPITAL H WHERE H.BIZ_NO = B.BIZ_NO )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_HOSPITAL SET NAME = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PHONE = #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADDR = #{addr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADDR_DETAIL = #{addrDetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DESCRIPTION = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HOURS_JSON = #{hoursJson, jdbcType=CLOB}, TAG_LIST = #{tagList, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAT = #{lat, jdbcType=DOUBLE}, LNG = #{lng, jdbcType=DOUBLE} WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId}
mapper.select:
SELECT R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RESV_NO AS resvNo, R.RESV_TYPE AS resvType, R.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, R.PET_ID AS petId, R.TARGET_ID AS targetId, R.RESV_DATE AS resvDate, R.RESV_TIME AS resvTime, R.SYMPTOMS AS symptoms, R.REQUEST_MEMO AS requestMemo, R.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, R.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, R.REG_DATE AS regDate, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies, P.BREED AS petBreed, P.AGE AS petAge FROM TB_RESERVATION R JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = R.PET_ID WHERE R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{hospitalId})
AND R.STATUS_CD = 'PENDING'
AND R.STATUS_CD = 'CONFIRMED'
AND R.STATUS_CD = 'DONE'
AND R.STATUS_CD IN ('CANCEL', 'REJECTED')
ORDER BY R.RESV_DATE DESC, R.RESV_TIME DESC, R.RESV_ID DESC

SELECT R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RESV_NO AS resvNo, R.RESV_TYPE AS resvType, R.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, R.PET_ID AS petId, R.TARGET_ID AS targetId, R.RESV_DATE AS resvDate, R.RESV_TIME AS resvTime, R.SYMPTOMS AS symptoms, R.REQUEST_MEMO AS requestMemo, R.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, R.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, R.REG_DATE AS regDate, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies, P.BREED AS petBreed, P.AGE AS petAge FROM TB_RESERVATION R JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = R.PET_ID WHERE R.RESV_ID = #{resvId} AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{hospitalId}) AND R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL'

SELECT R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RESV_NO AS resvNo, R.RESV_DATE AS resvDate, R.RESV_TIME AS resvTime, R.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, P.PET_NAME AS petName FROM TB_RESERVATION R JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = R.PET_ID WHERE R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{hospitalId}) AND R.STATUS_CD IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'DONE') AND R.RESV_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND R.RESV_DATE < TO_DATE(#{toDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 ORDER BY R.RESV_DATE, R.RESV_TIME
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_RESERVATION R WHERE R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{hospitalId}) AND R.STATUS_CD = 'PENDING'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_RESERVATION R WHERE R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{hospitalId}) AND R.STATUS_CD = 'CONFIRMED' AND R.RESV_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND R.RESV_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1
